history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

Two young men are squatting on a tiled floor, leaning against a plain beige wall. The man in the foreground, on the left, is wearing a black and white striped t-shirt and dark patterned shorts, with black flip-flops. He has a beard and is looking at his smartphone, which he holds in his left hand. In his right hand, he holds a cigarette. Next to his feet, on the floor, is a small purple cup. The man in the background, on the right, is wearing a dark red t-shirt and dark trousers with a white stripe down the side, and light brown sandals. He is looking to his left and has his right hand raised near his face. The lighting is somewhat dim, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and somewhat mundane. The color palette is dominated by earthy tones of beige, red, black, and white, with the purple cup adding a small pop of color. The image has a realistic, documentary feel.
